title: GaapAccountingStandard
description: A US GAAP accounting standard entry from the FASB Accounting Standards Codification, representing a topic, subtopic, or accounting standards update.

id.description: FASB ASC topic or ASU identifier

title.description: Title of the accounting standard or update
title.example: Income Taxes (Topic 740): Improvements to Income Tax Disclosures

topicName.description: Name of the ASC topic area

issuedDate.description: Date the standard or update was issued

effectiveDate.description: Mandatory effective date for public business entities

summary.description: Brief description of the standard's purpose and key requirements

applicability.description: Entities to which the standard applies

url.description: URL to the standard in the FASB ASC or on fasb.org

relatedTopics.description: Other ASC topic numbers related to this standard
